title: SL1 4AX, Equinix (UK) Limited: environmental permit issued – EPR/LP3303PR/V004
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: Equinix (UK) Limited   Installation name: Equinix Slough Campus Data Centre   Permit number: EPR/LP3303PR/V004   "
